## PrivaCI v1.0.0

First stable release of the in-VPC PostgreSQL masking engine.

### Highlights

- GA stable channel — same codebase as `v0.1.0-beta.7` with semver `1.0.0`.
- `CONTRACT_VERSION` remains `1.0` for plugin packages on contract `1.0.x`.

### Install

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/boundarylogic/privaci:1.0.0
docker pull ghcr.io/boundarylogic/privaci:latest

helm install privaci oci://ghcr.io/boundarylogic/charts/privaci --version 1.0.0

pip install "privaci @ git+https://github.com/BoundaryLogic/privaci@v1.0.0"
```

Docs: https://boundarylogic.github.io/privaci/

Full history: [CHANGELOG.md](https://github.com/BoundaryLogic/privaci/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md).
